feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Death Warrant
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,674Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Stiles is determined to walk away from his destiny. He refuses to bow down to a monster. But against a dynasty whose power is vaster than the continent, how far he will be able to go?   I suck at writing summary, or writing in general. This fic is dark and pretty depressing. There is going to be violence, death and all the bad things you can thing. and i am pretty sure it won't have a happy ending. The writer is miserable, thus have decided to take it out on here. So read if you feel like you can stomach such plots.

entry.title: When Werewolves Do Jane Austen Shit
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,499Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 76

Summary: After the Hale Fire, Laura and Derek, along with Cora, steal comatose Peter out of the hospital. Laura gives up the alpha spark to bring Peter back. But a pack, even the mighty Hales, can only survive so long without an alpha. Derek had always known that he was to be trained for a marriage alliance with another pack, and he will do whatever it takes to keep his family safe. Stiles knows the McCall pack is on borrowed time. They've kept Beacon Hills safe, but they have no money, no history, no respect from the good side of the supernatural world. He knows they need to go to the Summit meeting...party...thing, and make connections or they are screwed. Two groups in desperate need, stuck in a conference hotel in Vegas. Whatever will happen?

entry.title: Tangled, Ravelled, and Undogged
entry.summary:
Author: Stout

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,126Chapters: 8/9Kudos: 63

Summary: After making several mistakes in a row, Stiles finds himself stuck in a haunted manor in the middle of a cursed wood, and faced with a terrifying, monstrous Beast demanding custody of some unlucky (and possibly beloved) scapegoat in exchange for Stiles' freedom. (But the Beast never said that Stiles couldn't visit.)

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,273Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 17

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: A Fragile Thing
entry.summary:
Author: OyasumiPunPun

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,961Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 54

Summary: Derek Hale wanders into a forgotten corner of the city one rainy night, drawn by the pull of cyber-jazz from a hidden stairwell. Inside an underground gallery, one painting stops him cold—and then the artist does.Stiles Stilinski, with amber eyes, turpentine-stained hands, and an unsettling way of seeing right through people, offers something Derek has never allowed himself to want.One encounter. One fragile thing.And the carefully constructed life he’s trapped in—marriage, family, name—begins to crack.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,231Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 132

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: It Was A Stranger Beneath My Face
entry.summary:
Author: Lady_Grey94

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,692Chapters: 3/12Kudos: 63

Summary: Unknown caller.Okay. Great.Not like it could be the scum of the earth that he’d been hunting across goddamn Narnia or anything. He knew, Stiles knew that he shouldn’t answer it, but at this point he was a glutton for punishment.“Stilinski speaking,” he said, work voice in place despite the way his chest still heaved and his legs burned post-run. The line was silent for a moment.“Stiles?” The voice was familiar and it seemed shocked that he had picked up his own phone. or An AU where the Nogistune ordeal happens... differently but Stiles is still cast out. Alas, a string of murders have the pack crawling back for help. Shenanigans ensue.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski and the Great Star Wars Betrayal
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,349Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: A quiet moment between Peter and Isabelle is violently interrupted when Stiles and Derek storm in mid-argument over the most ridiculous topic imaginable: Jar Jar Binks. What starts as a plea for Isabelle to side with her twin quickly backfires when she passionately defends Jar Jar (and the droids) sparking full-blown chaos. With Peter gleefully encouraging the madness, Derek siding against him, and even Chris joining the “wrong” team, Stiles finds himself completely outnumbered, out-argued, and physically tackled for his bad opinions. By the end, the house descends into laughter, betrayal, and absolute nonsense, proving once again that in this family, Stiles will never win.

entry.title: Five Times Stiles Did Something Surprising and the One Time Derek Noticed
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,132Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 328

Summary: “I’m really sorry. Derek?”“Yes sir?”“I’ve been trying to ignore it, but—who is that?”Derek blinked at the screen, confused. “I’m sorry?”“That.” The client pointed at his screen, then seemed to remember Derek wouldn’t know any better with that action. “The person in the background.”It took a second for Derek to realize that people could see Stiles behind him. He hadn’t actually thought about the fact that his watching his boyfriend earlier was specifically because he could see him. Which meant everyone else could, too.

entry.title: wandering the streets at night, caught up in the city lights—it’s alright, ten minutes ’til the sunrise
entry.summary:

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 600Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: Derek leaves Beacon Hills for New York City; and that’s not surprising—the text he gets from Derek after spring term ends: spend some of the summer here; yeah, that's surprising.

entry.title: said goodbye to my virtue: heaven only knows how i've longed for you
entry.summary:
Author: stendhal

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,900Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 148

Summary: “What's wrong.” Despite being a question, Derek says it like a statement. There’s this thin edge of long suffering, of please don’t actually tell me attached as Derek stares blank faced at the beer bottle between his fingers—like the last thing Derek wants to do while lounging model perfect in the dirt with his stupid lumberjack flannel is entertain the drunken musings of a hyperactive teenager who can’t stop wiggling around on a tree stump, despite a bunch of teenagers being here on Derek’s behest. Whatever, dude. Derek can pretend all he wants, but he likes them. Derek waits: there's plenty of snarky things he could say, could even go so far as to make up some problem—but, instead, he says: “I’m kinda... horny. I think. From the alcohol, maybe? It’s, weird.” He doesn't register any of this as inherently weird ’til Derek whips his head up. He could smack himself. Jesus fucking Christ, Stiles.Stiles is of the opinion that a good pack alpha lends a helping hand when it's needed, and Derek's never had a good track record for that kind of thing, so—pardon him if he's a bit... surprised.

entry.title: Don’t go where I can’t
entry.summary:
Author: WhoSaidImFin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,429Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Stiles and Derek have been married for two years, and for once, life in Beacon Hills is quiet — until Stiles is brutally attacked while investigating something near a lake and left fighting for his life. Derek is forced to watch helplessly as he’s put on a ventilator, slips into a coma, and nearly dies, and even when Stiles wakes, the wounds don’t heal normally and the nightmares don’t stop. As recovery turns into something far more complicated, both of them struggle with fear, guilt, and the reality that almost losing each other changes everything.

entry.title: song of the phoenix
entry.summary:
Author: graveltotempo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 228,255Chapters: 57/60Kudos: 7,053

Summary: In a last ditch effort to save Beacon Hills after everyone else has died, Stiles channels all of his energy and magic into cleansing the Nemeton and the magical core of the town. But he is more powerful than he knows, more connected to the Nemeton than anyone can guess, and a group of kids, teenagers and adults wakes up in the middle of the night ten years earlier with a second chance they didn't know they needed and a bond they don't understand. Stiles though? Stiles wakes up with a little more.

entry.title: Where Theory Meets Temptation
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,017Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Professor Scott is obsessed with making his brilliant student Derek the university’s all-time top ranker. His wife Stiles is a shameless, dripping slut who craves cock while her husband buries himself in work. When Derek struggles with female anatomy, clueless Scott strips Stiles naked on the table and uses her body as a living model — marking her fat tits, puffy pink pussy, and tight asshole with pens while explaining every part. Stiles moans like a whore, spreads her legs wider, and whispers to Derek, “Fuck your professor’s slutty wife while he draws.” What begins as innocent tutoring quickly turns into Derek secretly pounding Stiles's holes behind Scott’s back — filling her married cunt and ass while the proud professor praises his star student’s “dedication.” Scott never suspects his perfect wife has become his favorite student’s eager cumdump.

entry.title: Observations and Implications
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,598Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: In the loft, a late-night game of compliments spirals out of control when Stiles demands Derek say something he likes about his body. What starts as a simple, awkward observation quickly turns into chaos when Erica turns it suggestive, Isaac and Boyd pile on, and River quietly documents it all. Between teasing, accidental honesty, and growing tension between Stiles and Derek, the pack ends up exposing far more than just opinions on legs and hair. In the end, what looks like nonsense is really just their strange, unspoken way of understanding each other and Derek, despite himself, doesn’t walk away.

entry.title: Beacon of Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: IndridxCold

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,549Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 99

Summary: Stiles leaves Beacon Hills with one mind: LEAVE BEHIND ALL THE WEREWOLF DRAMA and especially his beloved Derek Hale. Unfortunately, the universe has a pretty funny sense of humor, because he ends up in Gotham City, home to masked lunatics, crime-ridden alleys, and a caped crusader that reigns the night. Stiles keeps telling himself, he's passing through... except Gotham has a way of pulling people in. Between getting tangled up with the brooding Dark Knight to crossing paths with the mysterious but also dashing billionaire playboy, Bruce Wayne, Stiles somehow finds himself right in the middle of something bigger than Gotham's usual chaos. Because while everyone's busy watching the streets, something else is moving in the shadows and connecting people who should have nothing to do with each other... especially Stiles.

entry.title: Hale Blood, Stilinski Chaos, Dutton Country
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,394Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Stilinski & Hale family hit the Dutton Ranch and nothing stays calm for long. Isabelle draws attention she didn’t ask for, Peter gets possessive in record time, Derek decides bull riding is a personality now, and Stiles is 50% concern, 50% distracted appreciation. Beth Dutton stirs chaos like it’s cardio, Rip judges everyone equally, and John Dutton tries to keep the peace while slowly realizing that’s not happening. Cowboys, wolves, tension, and absolutely no emotional safety in sight.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: My Name is Ours at Night
entry.summary:
Author: strawberry_chicken

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,405Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 34

Summary: (End season 2) After a ritual gone wrong, Stiles should be dead. Instead, he wakes up with a hole in his body and something inside him—something wrong, something hungry. Derek knows there's a threat in town. He just didn't expect it to look like Stiles.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
